title: Generics, Constraints, Inference, and Variance · Mastery Check
summary: Build reusable selectors and repositories that preserve relationships between keys, inputs, outputs, and callbacks. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a relationship-preserving generic data toolkit. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Introduce a type parameter only when multiple positions share a relationship that callers need preserved.
Constrain operations while returning the caller-specific subtype rather than widening to the constraint.
Use keyof and indexed access types to connect property names with their corresponding value types.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.typescript:
// typescript-basics cumulative strict TypeScript portfolio.
// Add one typed behavior, runtime boundary, changed case, and evidence return per activity.

steps.title: Reconstruct the defensible process
steps.instruction: Order the Generic Relationships evidence cycle for this quiz task before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Generic Relationships assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: A lookup accepts keys "id" and "status" from records numbered 2–4. Preserve the relationship between the selected key and return type, then reject a callback that handles a narrower record than callers may supply.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Generic Relationships has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

hints: Name the Generic Relationships precondition or invariant that the quiz case must preserve.

Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: Every reusable function needs a generic type parameter.

options.text: Declare the domain relationship and identify every untrusted runtime boundary
Infer or annotate the smallest sound type and validate unknown values before narrowing
Run strict diagnostics, inspect emitted JavaScript, and execute the changed case
Add compile-time rejection and runtime boundary evidence, then document remaining limits

steps.title: Defend one difficult decision

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Analyze covariance, contravariance, invariance, and bivariant compatibility from producer and consumer positions.
